items.claim: Abdul Hussein is undersized for the bantamweight division.
items.quote: I think Abdullah Hussein just in general is a very undized bantamweight.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is physically very large for the bantamweight division.
items.quote: Cody Gibson who is absolutely massive for bantamweight.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is at a disadvantage due to the short-notice travel from the US to Abu Dhabi and the associated weight cut.
items.quote: Cody Gibson is taking this on short notice and also Cody Gibson not only needs to take the fight on short notice, make the weight on short notice, he also needs to go from the United States to Abu Dhabi

items.claim: Cody Gibson has historically questionable cardio.
items.quote: One of which I've always worried about, that's the cardio.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's chin may be a concern following his recent 21-second knockout loss.
items.quote: he did get knocked out by Archie Long at only 21 seconds in his last one. So Mal maybe it could be time to worry about the chin.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is a high-level wrestler who utilizes a high striking pace.
items.quote: Gibson is a very good wrestler. He does get multiple takedowns in the fights that he does win. he can put a very high pace on in the striking.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has poor takedown accuracy.
items.quote: he does shoot a lot of takedowns, but he has a very, very bad takedown accuracy.
